title: Maximum XOR of Two Numbers in an Array
hints: Consider the bits from most significant to least significant. Can you determine if the maximum possible XOR has a 1 at the current bit position?
Use a set of prefixes. For each bit position, check if any two prefixes in the set differ at that bit when combined with the current target prefix.
If you have a set of prefixes and a target value, you can find if there exists a prefix in the set such that prefix XOR target equals the desired value.
